shots.prompt: A vast cathedral of glowing stained glass slowly breathing and morphing, fractal rose windows blooming and folding, hyper-saturated neon light bleeding across liquid stone. Seamless psychedelic motion, kaleidoscopic symmetry.
The cathedral columns melt upward into luminous vines of sacred geometry, recursive arches opening into infinite recursive arches, colors pulsing in waves. Mesmerizing, continuous.
Kaleidoscopic explosion of liquid gold and violet light unfolding into mandala patterns that breathe and rotate, impossible Escher staircases spiraling inward. Hypnotic, fluid.
Camera drifts through an endless tunnel of breathing neon glass blossoms, reality folding origami-like into deeper fractal layers, bioluminescent and dreamlike. Smooth infinite zoom.
